name: healthcare_municipal_bond_covenant_cedar_tru_loy
premise: A transplant center received an organ offer that conflicts with an internal research biopsy schedule and OR block time. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare municipal bond covenant cedar tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Sana Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Sana Kowalski, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Kim
agents.identity: I am Elliot Kim, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Sana Kowalski must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Sana Kowalski do?
